channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Omar confronted on camera over GOP proposal targeting foreign-born lawmakers.
item.description: Rep. Ilhan Omar responds to Rep. Nancy Mace's proposed constitutional amendment that would bar foreign-born individuals from serving in Congress.

item.title: The Essex Files: Beyond the gunman, the dark truth about who is truly setting the tone for violence.
AOC expands national profile amid 2028 speculation.
item.description: Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez is intensifying her national political activity as speculation grows over whether the progressive Democrat will launch a campaign.

item.title: Trump endorses Ty Masterson in Kansas governor race.
item.description: President Donald Trump on Sunday endorsed Ty Masterson in the Republican primary for governor of Kansas, throwing his support behind the longtime state senator.
